title: metrosideros polymorpha var. micrantha
intro: Metrosideros polymorpha var. micrantha, also known as the 'Ma'o hau hele', is a variety of the Metrosideros polymorpha tree, native to Hawaii, and is prized for its vibrant yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ma'o hau hele include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Ma'o hau hele can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties and experience its health benefits.
